_pretenured_746544395_add: newObject	"Add a new object at the end of the collection, and returns the object itself"	"((OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) add: 43; yourself) asArray >>> #(42 43)"	"Add returns the object itself"	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42) >>> 42"	"You may want to use yourself to return the collection itself"	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) class >>> OrderedCollection"	"(OrderedCollection new add: 42; yourself) size >>> 1"	^ self _pretenured_746544395_addLast: newObject

_pretenured_746544395_addLast: newObject	"Add newObject to the end of the receiver. Answer newObject."	lastIndex = array size ifTrue: [		self _pretenured_746544395_makeRoomAtLast ].	lastIndex := lastIndex + 1.	^ array at: lastIndex put: newObject

_pretenured_746544395_makeRoomAtLast	"Make some empty slots at the end of the array. If we have more than 50% free space, then just move the elements, so that the last 50% of the slots are free, otherwise add new free slots to the end by growing. Precondition: lastIndex = array size"	| tally newFirstIndex newLastIndex |	tally := self size.	tally * 2 >= lastIndex ifTrue: [		^ self _pretenured_746544395_growAtLast ].	tally = 0 ifTrue: [ ^ self resetTo: 1 ].	newLastIndex := lastIndex // 2.	newFirstIndex := newLastIndex - lastIndex + firstIndex.	array		replaceFrom: newFirstIndex		to: newLastIndex		with: array		startingAt: firstIndex.	array from: newLastIndex + 1 to: lastIndex put: nil.	firstIndex := newFirstIndex.	lastIndex := newLastIndex

_pretenured_746544395_growAtLast	"Add new empty slots to the end of array, while keeping the empty slots at the front."	"OrderedCollection new capacity >>> 10"	"(OrderedCollection new growAtLast; capacity) >>> 20"	| newArray |	newArray := self class arrayType newTenured: (array size * 2 max: 1).	newArray		replaceFrom: firstIndex		to: lastIndex		with: array		startingAt: firstIndex.	array := newArray

_pretenured_883914067_add: newObject	"Include newObject as one of the receiver's elements, but only if	not already present. Answer newObject."	| index |	index := self scanFor: newObject.	(array at: index) ifNil: [			self				_pretenured_883914067_atNewIndex: index				put: newObject asCollectionElement ].	^ newObject
_pretenured_883914067_atNewIndex: index put: anObject	array at: index put: anObject.	tally := tally + 1.	self _pretenured_883914067_fullCheck
_pretenured_883914067_fullCheck	"Keep array at least 1/4 free for decent hash behavior"	array size - tally < (array size // 4 max: 1) ifTrue: [		self _pretenured_883914067_grow ]

_pretenured_883914067_grow	"Grow the elements array and reinsert the old elements"	| oldElements |	oldElements := array.	array := Array newTenured:		         (HashTableSizes atLeast: oldElements size * 2).	tally := 0.	oldElements do: [ :element |		element ifNotNil: [ self noCheckAdd: element enclosedElement ] ]

_pretenured_694037398_atNewIndex: index put: anObject	array at: index put: anObject.	tally := tally + 1.	self _pretenured_694037398_fullCheck
_pretenured_694037398_fullCheck	"Keep array at least 1/4 free for decent hash behavior"	array size - tally < (array size // 4 max: 1) ifTrue: [		self _pretenured_694037398_grow ]

If we have more than 50% free space, then just move the elements, so that the last 50% of the slots are free, otherwise add new free slots to the end by growing. _pretenured_843607772_copyWith: newElement	"Answer a copy of the receiver that is 1 bigger than the receiver and has	newElement at the last element."	| newIC |	newIC := self species newTenured: self size + 1.	newIC		replaceFrom: 1		to: self size		with: self		startingAt: 1.	newIC at: newIC size put: newElement.	^ newIC
initialize	super initialize.	keys := Array new: 2.	values := Array newTenured: 2.	size := 0
initialize	super initialize.	keys := Array newTenured: 2.	values := Array new: 2.	size := 0

attributeAt: name put: value	| aName |	aName := name asSymbol.	1 to: entityAttributes size do: [ :n |			aName == (entityAttributes at: n) key ifTrue: [				^ ((entityAttributes at: n) value: value) value ] ].	entityAttributes := entityAttributes _pretenured_843607772_copyWith:		                    aName -> value.	^ entityAttributes last value
updateCacheOnAddingOf: anElement	(byType privateMooseStorageAt: anElement class)		_pretenured_771942929_add: anElement.	^ anElement
named: aString	^ self newTenured		  name: aString;		  yourself
uncheckUnsafeAdd: element	"Calls the implementation in OrderedCollection."	super _pretenured_183620750_addLast: element
createInstance	^ implementingClass		  ifNil: [ FMRuntimeElement new description: self ]		  ifNotNil: [ implementingClass newTenured ]
flush	cache initialize
add: element	elements _pretenured_694037398_add: element.	self postAdd: element
resetPrivateState	entityAttributes := #(  ).	cache := SmallDictionary newTenured

dangling: reference to: serial	(reminderDict at: serial ifAbsentPut: [ OrderedCollection new ])		_pretenured_746544395_add: reference.	numberOfDanglingReferences := numberOfDanglingReferences + 1.	^ reference
addUser: aFM3Type	self users _pretenured_883914067_add: aFM3Type
